{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Rose power of healing
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] can call forth a rose power of healing that manifests as a pale reddish light.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The rose power of healing is tiring for [[Alin]] to use.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
